summary: Iteration 21 - 5 Chantiers Testing Complete. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All EmptyStatePanel components verified. S3REnR accent matching working correctly for Réaltor, Lavéra, Feuillane. PDF export handles empty body gracefully. RTE Fos-Jonquières project data displayed in sidebar.
passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (15/15) ===
GET /api/ returns API info (version 1.0.0)
GET /api/france/communes?q=Fos returns results
GET /api/map/electrical-assets returns 1140 postes (≥1000 expected)
REALTOR poste has S3REnR enrichment: mw_dispo=107, etat=disponible
LAVERA poste has S3REnR enrichment: mw_dispo=40, etat=disponible
FEUILLANE poste has S3REnR enrichment: mw_dispo=74, etat=disponible
S3REnR enrichment stats verified (disponible, contraint, sature counts)
POST /api/export/pdf with valid parcel returns PDF bytes
POST /api/export/pdf with empty {} body handled gracefully (returns 200 with minimal PDF)
POST /api/export/pdf with projet_fos field returns PDF
GET /api/map/rte-future-400kv returns data with line + buffers + metadata
GET /api/map/dc returns DC existants
GET /api/map/submarine-cables returns cables
GET /api/map/landing-points returns landing points
GET /api/s3renr/summary returns region data
=== FRONTEND UI TESTS ===
EmptyStatePanel visible with data-testid='empty-state-panel'
Quick search section with 7 pills (PACA 2ha+, Fos-sur-Mer, Hauts-de-France, Score > 70, > 5 hectares, Étang de Berre)
Fos project card shows: Projet RTE Fos-Jonquières, 3700 MW, 400 M€, 2029 horizon
Network capacity section shows PACA (3258 MW), Hauts-de-France (2925 MW), Île-de-France (SATURÉ)
Infrastructure KPIs: 1091 postes HTB, 61 DC existants, 8 landing points, 49 lignes THT
Quick guide with 5 steps visible
Quick search pill click opens chatbot with query pre-filled (externalChatMessage working)
Projet Fos panel code verified in ParcelDetail (data-testid='projet-fos-panel')
Comparison table includes 'Projet Fos' row
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user 'test_user_01' with session for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 verified the 5 chantiers update: 1) S3REnR accent matching working - Réaltor (107 MW), Lavéra (40 MW), Feuillane (74 MW) all show 'disponible' status. 2) Heatmap MW accent bug fixed via _normalize() with unicodedata accent stripping. 3) RTE Fos-Jonquières project data displayed in EmptyStatePanel sidebar (3700 MW, 400 M€, 2029). 4) PDF export secured with try/except and handles empty body gracefully. 5) EmptyStatePanel replaces old legend panel with quick search pills, Fos project card, capacity cards, infra KPIs, and guide. externalChatMessage prop working for quick search → chatbot integration. projet_fos field flows from S3REnR through enrichment to ParcelDetail and comparison table.

s3renr_accent_matching_verification.REALTOR: mw_dispo=107, etat=disponible, matched via accent stripping (Réaltor→REALTOR)
s3renr_accent_matching_verification.LAVERA: mw_dispo=40, etat=disponible, matched via accent stripping (Lavéra→LAVERA)

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - All data is real from OSM/Overpass and S3REnR
